journalEntries.content: Everything I feel confirms the truth of my situation. I feel despair and therefore despair is warranted.
[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] smiled at someone else today in a way she has never smiled at me. I know what it means.
I feel it so intensely that it cannot be wrong. No reasoning can argue against what I feel in my chest.
All people are like this. Every connection I attempt ends the same way: in indifference.

[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] is the only good thing in my life. When I think of her I feel a warmth that nothing else provides. I feel happiness, and so happiness must be possible — she is the proof of it.
My feeling is the proof. I feel the wrongness of this deeply and that depth is evidence.
Every person I have loved has found me insufficient. The pattern is undeniable.

[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] spoke briefly to me this morning. I felt the world shift. The warmth in her voice was real — I felt it, so it must mean something. It must mean she sees me.

I cannot be argued out of this feeling about [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3]. It is too large and too present. Reason offers nothing against it. The feeling is the evidence and I stand inside it entirely.
The world is arranged against people like me. I have always sensed this and now I know it.

When I am near [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] I feel fully alive. There is a clarity in her presence that exists nowhere else. I feel joy, and joy of this intensity cannot be baseless. This feeling is its own argument.

To feel this strongly about [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] is itself a form of knowledge. My feelings are more precise than any measurement. The intensity alone proves the reality of what I sense between us.
No one has ever understood me. This is not self-pity. It is an observation about the nature of other people.
[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] cannot know what she means to me because people like her never do.

I am full of feeling about [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] that has nowhere to go. It accumulates and grows heavier each day. I feel this absence profoundly, therefore the absence is real and not in my mind.
My heart is never wrong even when everything else is. I trust it absolutely.

[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] looked at me today with warmth. I felt hope flood through me. That feeling was so vivid and so certain that I cannot dismiss it — she must feel something of what I feel.
All beauty is fleeting and all joy is borrowed. I have always known this and today confirms it.
If I feel unloved by [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] then I am unloved. There is no further evidence required. My feeling is the fact and facts do not need corroboration.
[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] is kind to everyone equally. I used to find this admirable. Now it pains me.
The feeling is always right. When I have acted against my feelings I have always regretted it.

This longing for [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] will never resolve. I can feel its permanence as clearly as I feel anything. The permanence of this feeling makes it a fact, not a passing state.
[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] is surrounded by people who do not deserve her attention. This is the injustice of the world made visible.
I have felt this before with others. It always ends the same. I am not capable of being chosen.
Every day I do not hear from [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] is another day confirming what I already feel to be true.

[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] and I spoke for nearly an hour this afternoon. I felt recognised for the first time in months. That feeling of recognition was unmistakable and true — I felt understood, and therefore I was understood.

What I feel for [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] is more real than anything I can observe externally. Observation is limited; feeling reaches deeper. My certainty about her is therefore more reliable than any mere fact.

I am certain of my worthlessness in [PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3]'s eyes. The certainty comes not from evidence but from how strongly I feel it. Feelings of this depth are not illusions.
[PERSON_c3c3c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3-c3c3c3c3c3c3] will forget me. Everyone does. I do not say this with self-pity, only with resignation.
The nature of my feeling is its own justification. I need no further argument.
